name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
benefit: Zero-balance savings account, RuPay debit card, ₹1 lakh accident insurance, ₹30,000 life insurance
application_steps: Visit nearest bank branch or Business Correspondent
Fill PMJDY account opening form
Submit KYC documents (Aadhaar preferred)
Account opened instantly with zero balance
Receive RuPay debit card within 15 days

key_conditions: Must not have existing savings bank account

name: Ayushman Bharat - PM Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY)
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefit: Health insurance up to ₹5 lakh per year per family for secondary and tertiary hospitalisation
application_steps: Check eligibility at pmjay.gov.in or call 14555
Visit nearest Ayushman Mitra at empanelled hospital
Submit Aadhaar and ration card
Get Ayushman Card generated on spot
Use card for cashless treatment at any empanelled hospital

name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefit: ₹6,000/year in 3 instalments of ₹2,000 each via Direct Benefit Transfer
application_steps: Visit pmkisan.gov.in and click Farmer Corner
Click New Farmer Registration
Enter Aadhaar number and state
Fill personal and bank details
Complete eKYC via OTP
Submit and wait for state verification

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefit: Subsidised housing; interest subsidy on home loan; financial assistance for house construction
application_steps: Visit pmaymis.gov.in or Common Service Centre
Select PMAY-Urban or PMAY-Rural
Fill online application with income details
Upload required documents
Submit and note Application ID
Bank disburses subsidy after technical verification

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY) / Ujjwala 2.0
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
benefit: Free LPG connection; ₹1,600 financial assistance; free first refill and hot plate under Ujjwala 2.0
application_steps: Visit nearest LPG distributor (IOC/BPCL/HPCL)
Fill KYC and Ujjwala application form
Submit Aadhaar, ration card and bank details
Distributor verifies and forwards to oil company
Connection delivered to home

name: Jal Jeevan Mission (JJM)
benefit: Functional Household Tap Connection (FHTC) providing safe drinking water at home
application_steps: Contact Gram Panchayat or Pani Samiti of your village
Village Water and Sanitation Committee registers households
State PWD/PHED installs tap connections
No direct individual application; beneficiary identified by village

name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme (MGNREGS)
benefit: Legal guarantee of 100 days of unskilled wage employment per household per year
application_steps: Visit Gram Panchayat office
Apply for Job Card (Form A) with family details
Job Card issued within 15 days
Apply for work when required; work provided within 15 days
Wages credited directly to bank or post office account

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefit: Crop loss insurance; farmer premium 1.5–2% for food crops, 5% for horticulture; rest paid by government
application_steps: Visit bank branch, CSC, or pmfby.gov.in
Fill crop insurance application before cut-off date
Submit Aadhaar, land records and sowing declaration
Pay applicable premium
Receive policy document or acknowledgement

eligibility_rules.note: Loanee farmers auto-enrolled; non-loanee apply voluntarily

name: Swachh Bharat Mission (SBM)
benefit: ₹12,000 incentive for household toilet construction (rural); waste management support (urban)
application_steps: Visit Gram Panchayat (rural) or ULB office (urban)
Apply through local body or swachhbharaturban.gov.in
Toilet constructed and verified by local authority
₹12,000 incentive transferred to bank account post-construction

name: Digital India
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
benefit: Digital literacy, internet via BharatNet, e-governance services, Common Service Centres access
application_steps: Visit nearest Common Service Centre (CSC)
Enrol for PM Gramin Digital Saksharta Abhiyan (rural)
Complete digital literacy training
Receive digital literacy certificate

sub_scheme_PMGDISHA.condition: One digitally illiterate member per rural household

name: Poshan Abhiyaan (National Nutrition Mission)
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefit: Supplementary nutrition, health check-ups, immunisation for children under 6; support for pregnant and lactating mothers
application_steps: Register at nearest Anganwadi Centre
Provide child or pregnancy or breastfeeding status
Receive supplementary nutrition, health check-ups and immunisation

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
benefit: Collateral-free loans: Shishu (up to ₹50K), Kishore (₹50K–₹5L), Tarun (₹5L–₹10L), Tarun Plus (₹10L–₹20L)
application_steps: Visit any bank, MFI, NBFC or RRB
Apply at mudra.org.in or jansamarth.in
Submit business plan and KYC documents
Bank appraises and sanctions loan
MUDRA card issued for working capital

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
benefit: Free skill training with NSQF certification, stipend during training, placement assistance
application_steps: Visit pmkvyofficial.org to find nearest training centre
Register online with Aadhaar
Select preferred job role or trade
Complete free training at PMKVY training partner
Appear for Sector Skill Council assessment
Receive NSQF certificate and placement support

name: Startup India
benefit: Tax exemptions, fast-track patent filing, fund of funds access, regulatory relaxations, government tender eligibility
application_steps: Register on startupindia.gov.in
Fill Startup India registration form
Describe innovation or technology solution
DPIIT recognises startup within 2–3 working days
Apply separately for tax exemptions and IPR benefits

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
benefit: Guaranteed monthly pension of ₹1,000–₹5,000 after age 60 based on contribution amount
application_steps: Visit bank branch or use net banking of savings account
Fill APY registration form
Choose pension amount (₹1K–₹5K per month)
Complete Aadhaar-based eKYC
Auto-debit set up from savings account

name: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana (PMGKAY)
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
benefit: 5 kg free food grain (rice or wheat) per person per month under NFSA
application_steps: Beneficiaries identified through NFSA ration card
Visit nearest Fair Price Shop (Ration Shop)
Aadhaar-based ePoS biometric authentication
Collect free food grains every month

name: National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP)
benefit: Monthly pension ₹300–₹500 for elderly, widows and disabled; IGNOAPS, IGNWPS, IGNDPS sub-schemes
application_steps: Visit Gram Panchayat or District Social Welfare office
Fill NSAP application form for applicable sub-scheme
Submit BPL certificate, Aadhaar and supporting proof
District approval and pension credited monthly to bank account

name: Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana (PMGSY)
benefit: All-weather roads connecting unconnected rural habitations to nearest market/town
application_steps: Gram Panchayat files proposal through District Collectorate
DPR prepared and submitted to ministry
Road sanctioned and constructed by State PWD
Citizens benefit from connectivity automatically

name: SVAMITVA Scheme
benefit: Legal property rights card (Rights of Record) for rural household; enables bank loans against property
application_steps: Drone survey of village conducted by Survey of India
Maps verified by Gram Panchayat
Property card generated for each household
Distributed via State Revenue Department or Gram Panchayat

name: National Rural Livelihood Mission (NRLM / DAY-NRLM)
benefit: Revolving fund ₹15,000 per SHG, capital subsidy, bank linkage, skill and placement support
application_steps: Contact nearest NRLM resource person or Gram Panchayat
Women form Self Help Group (10–20 members)
SHG registered and bank account opened
Revolving fund credited after 3-month track record
Access credit, skill training and market linkages

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao (BBBP)
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefit: Promotes education and welfare of girl child; links to Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana scheme
application_steps: Open Sukanya Samriddhi account for girl child at post office or bank
Register with nearest Anganwadi for nutrition support
Ensure girl child school enrolment

name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefit: ₹5,000 maternity benefit for first child; ₹6,000 for second child if girl; paid in 3 instalments
application_steps: Register at nearest Anganwadi Centre within early pregnancy
Fill PMMVY application form
Submit Aadhaar, MCP card and bank details
Three instalments credited to bank account on milestones

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY)
benefit: High-interest savings for girl child (~8.2% p.a., tax-free maturity); matures after 21 years
application_steps: Visit any Post Office or authorised bank branch
Fill SSY account opening form
Submit girl child birth certificate and parent KYC
Deposit minimum ₹250 to open account
Deposit up to ₹1.5 lakh per year for 15 years

name: Stand-Up India
benefit: Bank loan ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for first-time greenfield enterprise by SC/ST or women entrepreneurs
application_steps: Register at standupmitra.in
Create profile and fill loan application
Select preferred bank branch
Submit business plan and KYC documents
Bank sanctions loan with moratorium up to 18 months

name: Saansad Adarsh Gram Yojana (SAGY)
benefit: Holistic development of MP-adopted village: infrastructure, livelihood, education, health via scheme convergence
application_steps: MP identifies and adopts a Gram Panchayat
Village Development Plan prepared with community participation
Existing government schemes converged for the village
Residents access all schemes through village Panchayat

name: AMRUT - Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefit: Water supply, sewerage, storm water drains, green spaces and urban transport in selected cities
application_steps: ULBs prepare Service Level Improvement Plans
State Annual Action Plans submitted to MoHUA
Projects sanctioned and implemented by ULB
Citizens benefit through improved city infrastructure
